name: golang-github-sergi-go-diff-dev
title: golang-github-sergi-go-diff-dev
summary: Diff, match and patch text in Go
description:
Diff, match and patch text in Go
This library provides algorithms to perform operations required for
synchronizing plain text.
.
These operations include:
* Compare two texts and return their differences.
* Perform fuzzy matching of text.
* Apply patches onto text.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-sergi-go-diff-dev because Diff, match and patch text in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-sergi-go-diff-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-sergi-go-diff-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-sergi-go-diff-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
